title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Deciem Beauty Group Ltd
body: "Application number 5060  Applicant Deciem UK Ltd objected to the name used by Deciem Beauty Group Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 25 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Deciem Beauty Group Ltd is changed to 15872946, LTD. "
